Advisory.Description:
### Impact
The `linkdave` HTTP server does not enforce authentication on its REST and WebSocket routes. Because this server may be exposed to the internet, any unauthenticated remote attacker can connect to these endpoints.

### Patches
[1.2.5](https://github.com/shi-gg/linkdave/commit/0f9a00d9d549b16278db81fce6dfec350c2abc01)

### Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, users can mitigate this issue by:
- Restricting network access to the server's port using a firewall so it is only accessible from trusted internal IP addresses.
Advisory.Summary: Linkdave Missing Authentication on REST and WebSocket endpoints
